sessions.intent: Design UI module piece 6: Liquid template rendering via Fluid

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-4 done (identity, crypto, signing, http). Piece 5 (cleanup) merged. Runtime1 has TemplateEngineModule (Scriban) and UiModule (DOM/layout). Ingi wants single module, Liquid syntax, Fluid library.
before.risk: Low — design only, no code changes.

sessions.plan: Single ui module with render action. Fluid (Liquid) as default provider. Memory stack accessible by default. Custom callGoal tag. No DOM/layout in scope.

actions.context: Architect plan for UI module template rendering

after.health: Design approved by Ingi. Ready for scaffolding.
after.notes: Key decisions: no separate template module, Fluid not Scriban, {{ }} syntax stays, callGoal needed for builder.
